name: Alliance Healthcare Group Limited
summary: Alliance Healthcare Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides corporate health solutions in Singapore, Hong Kong, Japan, Thailand, and internationally. It operates through Managed Healthcare Solutions, GP Clinic Services, Specialist Care Services, and Pharmaceutical Services segments. The Managed Healthcare Solutions segment offers managed healthcare solutions to corporations and insurance companies by establishing an extensive network of medical service providers to deliver healthcare services to the employees of corporations or insured members of policyholders of insurance companies. The GP Clinics Services segment provides primary healthcare medical services by general practitioners. The Specialist Care Services segment offers medical services by specialists. The Pharmaceutical Services segment engages in the wholesale of pharmaceutical products, including medicines and health supplements, as well as medical devices. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Singapore. Alliance Healthcare Group Limited is a subsidiary of Alpine Investment Holdings Pte. Ltd.
